rationale: The proposed change concerns Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. Elec. Code §253.092 governs incorporated political committees and has no bearing on homestead exemptions.
quote: If a political committee the only principal purpose of which is accepting political contributions and making political expenditures incorporates for liability purposes only, the committee is not considered to be a corporation for purposes of this subchapter.
_note: Rule text is unrelated to the proposed change; no conflict exists.
